questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 在 AWS 共擔責任模式下，下列何者是顧客的責任？
question_text.en: Under the AWS shared responsibility model, which of the following is a responsibility of the customer?

A.zh: 在磁碟機離開資料中心之前將其粉碎。
A.en: Shred disk drives before they leave a data center.

B.zh: 防止客戶在虛擬機器管理程式層級收集資料包或收集流量。
B.en: Prevent customers from gathering packets or collecting traffic at the hypervisor level.

C.zh: 使用最新的安全性修補程式修補來賓作業系統。
C.en: Patch the guest operating system with the latest security patches.

D.zh: 維護提供資料中心實體監控的安全系統。
D.en: Maintain security systems that provide physical monitoring of data centers.

A.zh: 錯誤。磁碟機的實體破壞是 AWS 的責任，因為它關係到資料中心的實體安全，這是 AWS 在共享責任模型中的責任。
A.en: Incorrect. The physical destruction of the disk drive is AWS's responsibility as it relates to the physical security of the data center, which is AWS's responsibility in the shared responsibility model.

B.zh: 錯誤。虛擬機器管理程式層級的安全性是 AWS 的責任，因為它屬於虛擬化層的管理，而虛擬化層是 AWS 在共享責任模型中的責任。
B.en: Incorrect. Hypervisor level security is the responsibility of AWS because it falls under the management of the virtualization layer, which is AWS's responsibility in the shared responsibility model.

C.zh: 正確。客戶負責管理和維護在 AWS 上運行的作業系統，包括安裝最新的安全修補程式。這是共享責任模式中客戶的責任。
C.en: Correct. Customers are responsible for managing and maintaining their operating systems running on AWS, including installing the latest security patches. This is the client's responsibility in a shared responsibility model.

D.zh: 錯誤。資料中心的實體監控是 AWS 的責任，因為它屬於基礎設施的實體安全範圍，而這是 AWS 在共享責任模型中的責任。
D.en: Incorrect. Physical monitoring of the data center is AWS's responsibility because it falls under the physical security of the infrastructure, which is AWS's responsibility in the shared responsibility model.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用最新的安全性修補程式修補來賓作業系統。
answer_text.en: C. Patch the guest operating system with the latest security patches.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：客戶負責管理和維護在 AWS 上運行的作業系統，包括安裝最新的安全修補程式。這是共享責任模式中客戶的責任。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Customers are responsible for managing and maintaining their operating systems running on AWS, including installing the latest security patches. This is the client's responsibility in a shared responsibility model.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務使用語音轉換為使用者來幫助使用者建立會議記錄？
question_text.en: Which AWS service uses speech-to-text conversion to help users create meeting notes?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 Polly
A.en: Amazon Polly

B.zh: 亞馬遜 Textract
B.en: Amazon Textract

C.zh: 亞馬遜 Rekognition
C.en: Amazon Rekognition

D.zh: 亞馬遜轉錄
D.en: Amazon Transcribe

A.zh: 錯誤。是一種文字轉語音服務，可將文字轉換為自然語音，而不是語音轉文字。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a text-to-speech service that converts text into natural speech rather than speech-to-text. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一項從文件中提取文字和資料的服務。它主要用於處理掃描文件或圖像中的文本，而不是語音轉文本。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is a service for extracting text and data from documents. It is mainly used to process text in scanned documents or images, rather than speech-to-text. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一種影像和視訊分析服務，用於識別物件、場景、臉部等，獨立於語音處理。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. is an image and video analysis service for identifying objects, scenes, faces, and more, independent of speech processing. Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。是一項語音轉文本服務，旨在將音訊檔案中的語音轉換為文本，非常適合建立會議記錄。因此這個選項是。
D.en: Correct. is a Speech-to-Text service that is designed to convert speech in audio files into text, making it ideal for creating meeting notes. Therefore this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項語音轉文本服務，旨在將音訊檔案中的語音轉換為文本，非常適合建立會議記錄。因此這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a Speech-to-Text service that is designed to convert speech in audio files into text, making it ideal for creating meeting notes. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務或工具為使用者提供了可用於管理 AWS 服務的圖形介面？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or tool provides users with a graphical interface that they can use to manage AWS services?

A.zh: AWS 副駕駛
A.en: AWS Copilot

B.zh: AWS CLI
B.en: AWS CLI

C.zh: AWS 管理主控臺
C.en: AWS Management Console

D.zh: AWS 軟體開發套件 (SDK)
D.en: AWS software development kits (SDKs)

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Copilot 是一個命令列工具，主要用於幫助開發人員快速部署和管理容器化應用程序，而不是提供圖形介面。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Copilot is a command-line tool that is mainly used to help developers quickly deploy and manage containerized applications, rather than providing a graphical interface.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS CLI 是一種命令列介面工具，允許使用者透過命令列而不是圖形介面與 AWS 服務互動。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS CLI is a command line interface tool that allows users to interact with AWS services through the command line instead of a graphical interface.

C.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：AWS 管理主控臺提供基於 Web 的圖形使用者介面，使用者可透過此介面管理和監控 AWS 服務。
C.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Management Console provides a web-based graphical user interface through which users can manage and monitor AWS services.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS SDK 是主要用於程式設計以及與 AWS 服務互動的開發工具包，而不是圖形介面。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS SDKs are development toolkits primarily used for programming and interacting with AWS services, rather than graphical interfaces.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：AWS 管理主控臺提供基於 Web 的圖形使用者介面，使用者可透過此介面管理和監控 AWS 服務。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Management Console provides a web-based graphical user interface through which users can manage and monitor AWS services.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 某公司有一個工作負載將連續運作 1 年。工作負載不能容忍服務中斷。哪種 Amazon EC2 購買選項最具成本效益？
question_text.en: A company has a workload that will run continuously for 1 year. The workload cannot tolerate service interruptions. Which Amazon EC2 purchasing option will be MOST cost-effective?

A.zh: 所有前期預留實例
A.en: All Upfront Reserved Instances

B.zh: 部分預付費用預留實例
B.en: Partial Upfront Reserved Instances

C.zh: 專用實例
C.en: Dedicated Instances

D.zh: 按需實例
D.en: On-Demand Instances

A.zh: 正確。對於長時間運行的工作負載，預留執行個體是最具成本效益的選項。選擇全預付方式，在保證資源連續性的同時獲得最大的折扣。
A.en: Correct. For long-running workloads, Reserved Instances are the most cost-effective option. Choose the All Upfront payment method to get the biggest discount while ensuring resource continuity.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然部分預付預留實例也提供成本優化，但折扣比「全部預付」小，因此並不是最具成本效益的選擇。
B.en: Incorrect. Although Partial Upfront Reserved Instances also provide cost optimization, the discounts are smaller than those of "All Upfront", so they are not the most cost-effective option.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：專用實例主要用於滿足特定的合規性或隔離要求。價格較高，不適合只追求性價比的場景。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Dedicated Instances are mainly used to meet specific compliance or isolation requirements. They are more expensive and are not suitable for scenarios that only pursue cost-effectiveness.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：按需實例雖然靈活，但價格最昂貴，且不適合長時間運行的工作負載。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: On-Demand Instances, although flexible, are the most expensive and are not suitable for long-running workloads.

answer_text.zh: A. 所有前期預留實例

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：對於長時間運行的工作負載，預留執行個體是最具成本效益的選項。選擇全預付方式，在保證資源連續性的同時獲得最大的折扣。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: For long-running workloads, Reserved Instances are the most cost-effective option. Choose the All Upfront payment method to get the biggest discount while ensuring resource continuity.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司將其係統遷移到 AWS 雲端。系統已調整規模，安全審查未發現任何問題。公司必須確保額外的開發、整合、變更和系統使用成長不會危及此優化的 AWS 基礎架構。公司應使用哪種 AWS 服務來報告持續的最佳化和安全性？
question_text.en: A company migrated its systems to the AWS Cloud. The systems are rightsized, and a security review did not reveal any issues. The company must ensure that additional developments, integrations, changes, and system usage growth do not jeopardize this optimized AWS infrastructure. Which AWS service should the company use to report ongoing optimization and security?

A.zh: AWS 可信任顧問
A.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

B.zh: AWS 運作狀況儀錶板
B.en: AWS Health Dashboard

C.zh: 亞馬遜連接
C.en: Amazon Connect

D.zh: AWS 系統管理器
D.en: AWS Systems Manager

A.zh: 正確。AWS Trusted Advisor 是一款線上工具，可提供即時建議，協助使用者優化其 AWS 環境的成本、效能、安全性和容錯能力。它可以報告優化和安全相關的建議，從而滿足問題要求。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Trusted Advisor is an online tool that provides real-time recommendations to help users optimize the cost, performance, security, and fault tolerance of their AWS environment. It can report optimization and security-related suggestions and therefore meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Health Dashboard 提供與 AWS 服務相關的運作狀況訊息，但它主要用於監控服務中斷或事件，而不是持續的最佳化和安全建議。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Health Dashboard provides health information related to AWS services, but it is primarily used for monitoring service outages or events rather than ongoing optimization and security recommendations.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Connect 是一種雲端聯絡中心解決方案，與最佳化和安全性無關。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Connect is a cloud contact center solution that is not about optimization and security.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Systems Manager 是一種用於操作和管理 AWS 資源的管理工具，但它不是專門為報告最佳化和安全狀態而設計的服務。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Systems Manager is a management tool for operating and managing AWS resources, but it is not a service designed specifically for reporting on optimization and security status.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Trusted Advisor 是一款線上工具，可提供即時建議，協助使用者優化其 AWS 環境的成本、效能、安全性和容錯能力。它可以報告優化和安全相關的建議，從而滿足問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Trusted Advisor is an online tool that provides real-time recommendations to help users optimize the cost, performance, security, and fault tolerance of their AWS environment. It can report optimization and security-related suggestions and therefore meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪種 AWS 服務與其他 AWS 服務整合以提供靜態資料加密功能？
question_text.en: Which AWS service integrates with other AWS services to provide the ability to encrypt data at rest?

A.zh: AWS 金鑰管理服務 (AWS KMS)
A.en: AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS)

B.zh: AWS 憑證管理器 (ACM)
B.en: AWS Certificate Manager (ACM)

C.zh: AWS 身分和存取管理 (IAM)
C.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

D.zh: AWS 安全中心
D.en: AWS Security Hub

A.zh: 正確。AWS KMS 是一項專門用於管理加密金鑰的服務。它與其他 AWS 服務整合並支援靜態資料加密。它可以產生、儲存和管理加密金鑰，並與Amazon S3、EBS、RDS等服務對接以實現加密。
A.en: Correct. AWS KMS is a service specifically designed to manage encryption keys. It integrates with other AWS services and supports data at rest encryption. It can generate, store and manage encryption keys, and interface with services such as Amazon S3, EBS, RDS, etc. to implement encryption.

B.zh: 錯誤。ACM 主要用於管理 SSL/TLS 憑證並保護傳輸中資料的安全性。它不是國家加密。
B.en: Incorrect. ACM is mainly used to manage SSL/TLS certificates and to protect the security of data in transit. It is not a state encryption.

C.zh: 錯誤。IAM主要用於管理使用者和權限，確保資源存取的安全，但不直接用於加密資料。
C.en: Incorrect. IAM is mainly used to manage users and permissions to ensure the security of resource access, but it is not directly used to encrypt data.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Security Hub 是一項安全管理和控制服務，用於聚合和分析安全數據，但不負責加密數據。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Security Hub is a security management and control service that aggregates and analyzes security data, but it is not responsible for encrypting the data.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS 金鑰管理服務 (AWS KMS)
answer_text.en: A. AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS KMS 是一項專門用於管理加密金鑰的服務。它與其他 AWS 服務整合並支援靜態資料加密。它可以產生、儲存和管理加密金鑰，並與Amazon S3、EBS、RDS等服務對接以實現加密。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS KMS is a service specifically designed to manage encryption keys. It integrates with other AWS services and supports data at rest encryption. It can generate, store and manage encryption keys, and interface with services such as Amazon S3, EBS, RDS, etc. to implement encryption.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望追蹤特定 AWS 環境中所有 Amazon EC2 執行個體的每月成本和使用情況。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to track the monthly cost and usage of all Amazon EC2 instances in a specific AWS environment. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS 成本異常檢測
A.en: AWS Cost Anomaly Detection

B.zh: AWS 預算
B.en: AWS Budgets

C.zh: AWS 計算最佳化器
C.en: AWS Compute Optimizer

D.zh: AWS 可信任顧問
D.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

A.zh: 錯誤。該服務用於檢測成本和使用模式中的異常情況，但它不提供詳細的每月成本和使用報告，因此不符合問題要求。
A.en: Incorrect. This service is used to detect anomalies in cost and usage patterns, but it does not provide detailed monthly cost and usage reports and therefore does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 正確。允許使用者設定預算並追蹤成本和使用情況，提供詳細的報告和通知功能，完全滿足問題的要求。
B.en: Correct. allows users to set budgets and track costs and usage, providing detailed reporting and notification functions, which fully meets the requirements of the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。該服務用於優化計算資源的使用效率並提供降低成本的建議，但不是直接用於追蹤每月的成本和使用情況，因此不滿足問題要求。
C.en: Incorrect. This service is used to optimize the usage efficiency of computing resources and provide suggestions to reduce costs, but it is not directly used to track monthly costs and usage, so it does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。該服務提供最佳化建議以提高安全性、性能和成本效率，但它不是專門為追蹤每月成本和使用情況而設計的，因此不滿足問題要求。
D.en: Incorrect. This service provides optimization recommendations to improve security, performance, and cost efficiency, but it is not specifically designed to track monthly costs and usage and therefore does not meet the question requirements.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：允許使用者設定預算並追蹤成本和使用情況，提供詳細的報告和通知功能，完全滿足問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: allows users to set budgets and track costs and usage, providing detailed reporting and notification functions, which fully meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 公司希望能夠根據需要自動取得資源並在不再需要時釋放資源。哪個雲概念描述了此功能？
question_text.en: A company wants the ability to automatically acquire resources as needed and release the resources when they are no longer needed. Which cloud concept describes this functionality?

A.zh: 可用性
A.en: Availability

B.zh: 彈性
B.en: Elasticity

C.zh: 耐用性
C.en: Durability

D.zh: 可靠性
D.en: Reliability

A.zh: 錯誤。是指系統或服務在需要時正常運作的能力。雖然可用性是雲端運算的重要屬性，但由於選擇錯誤，它與自動調整資源大小無關。
A.en: Incorrect. refers to the ability of a system or service to operate normally when needed. While availability is an important attribute of cloud computing, it has nothing to do with automatically sizing resources because of the wrong options.

B.zh: 正確。是雲端運算的核心屬性之一，指的是能夠根據需求動態增加或減少資源的能力。 「自動取得資源、釋放資源」的問題描述肯定是彈性的定義，所以選項是。
B.en: Correct. is one of the core properties of cloud computing, which refers to the ability to dynamically increase or decrease resources according to demand. The question description of "automatically acquiring resources and releasing resources" is definitely the definition of elasticity, so the options are.

C.zh: 錯誤。是指資料能夠長期保存而不在預存程序中遺失的能力。 cup選項與標題描述的動態資源調整無關，所以是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. refers to the ability of data to be stored for a long time without being lost during storage. The cup option has nothing to do with the dynamic resource adjustment of the title description, so it is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。是指系統在各種條件下持續正常運作的能力。雖然可靠性是雲端運算的重要特性，但這與因為選擇錯誤而動態調整資源無關。
D.en: Incorrect. refers to the ability of a system to continue to operate normally under various conditions. Although reliability is an important characteristic of cloud computing, it has nothing to do with the dynamic adjustment of resources because of the wrong options.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是雲端運算的核心屬性之一，指的是能夠根據需求動態增加或減少資源的能力。 「自動取得資源、釋放資源」的問題描述肯定是彈性的定義，所以選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is one of the core properties of cloud computing, which refers to the ability to dynamically increase or decrease resources according to demand. The question description of "automatically acquiring resources and releasing resources" is definitely the definition of elasticity, so the options are.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 執行個體中短暫執行其應用程式時希望有一個經濟高效的選擇。應用程式可以被中斷。哪種 EC2 執行個體類型可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants a cost-effective option when running its applications in an Amazon EC2 instance for short time periods. The applications can be interrupted. Which EC2 instance type will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Spot 實例
A.en: Spot Instances

B.zh: 按需實例
B.en: On-Demand Instances

C.zh: 預留實例
C.en: Reserved Instances

D.zh: 專用實例
D.en: Dedicated Instances

A.zh: 正確。Spot 執行個體是 EC2 執行個體的一種定價選項，允許使用者以比按需定價低得多的成本執行執行個體。它適合能夠容忍中斷的應用程序，例如批次任務或資料分析任務。由於問題提到應用程式可能會中斷，並且需要具有成本效益，因此 Spot 實例是最佳選擇。正確答案：A 正確答案：A.
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Spot Instances is a pricing option for EC2 instances that allows users to run instances at a significantly lower cost than on-demand pricing. It is suitable for applications that can tolerate interruptions, such as batch processing tasks or data analysis tasks. Since the question mentions that the application can be interrupted and needs to be cost-effective, Spot Instances is the best choice. Correct Answer: A Correct Answer: A.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：按需實例提供按需運算能力，按小時或秒計費，適合需要靈活性且不能容忍中斷的應用程式。雖然靈活，但成本較高，不符合問題中的「性價比」要求。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: On-Demand Instances provide on-demand computing power, billed by the hour or second, and are suitable for applications that require flexibility and cannot tolerate interruptions. Although it is flexible, the cost is high and does not meet the "cost-effectiveness" requirement in the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：預留實例適用於長期運行的應用程序，使用者承諾提前使用它們一段時間（通常是 1 或 3 年）以換取折扣價格。它不適合短期運行的應用程式。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Reserved Instances are for long-running applications where users commit to using them for a certain amount of time in advance (usually 1 or 3 years) in exchange for discounted pricing. It is not suitable for short-running applications.

D.zh: 錯誤。專用執行個體在專用硬體上運行，適用於需要實體隔離的工作負載。其成本較高，不符合問題中的「性價比」要求。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Dedicated Instances run on dedicated hardware and are suitable for workloads that require physical isolation. Its cost is relatively high and does not meet the "cost-effectiveness" requirement in the question.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：來源未提供投票比例。熱門討論與考點摘要：Spot 執行個體是 EC2 執行個體的一種定價選項，允許使用者以比按需定價低得多的成本執行執行個體。它適合能夠容忍中斷的應用程序，例如批次任務或資料分析任務。由於問題提到應用程式可能會中斷，並且需要具有成本效益，因此 Spot 實例是最佳選擇。正確答案：A 正確答案：A.
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: the source did not provide vote percentages. Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Spot Instances is a pricing option for EC2 instances that allows users to run instances at a significantly lower cost than on-demand pricing. It is suitable for applications that can tolerate interruptions, such as batch processing tasks or data analysis tasks. Since the question mentions that the application can be interrupted and needs to be cost-effective, Spot Instances is the best choice. Correct Answer: A Correct Answer: A.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有 AWS 業務支援計畫。該公司需要獲得 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT) 的存取權限，以協助緩解 DDoS 事件。公司必須使用哪些 AWS 服務或資源來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an AWS Business Support plan. The company needs to gain access to the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT) to help mitigate DDoS events. Which AWS service or resource must the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Shield 標準
A.en: AWS Shield Standard

B.zh: AWS 企業支持
B.en: AWS Enterprise Support

C.zh: AWS WAF
C.en: AWS WAF

D.zh: AWS Shield Advanced
D.en: AWS Shield Advanced

A.zh: 錯誤。是預設啟用的免費服務，提供基本的 DDoS 保護，但不包括對 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT) 的存取。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a free service enabled by default that provides basic DDoS protection but does not include access to the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT). Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。單獨購買企業支援方案並不能提供對 AWS DDoS 回應團隊的存取權；客戶必須使用 AWS Shield Advanced 才能獲得此專用回應支援。
B.en: Incorrect. Purchasing an Enterprise Support plan alone does not provide access to AWS DDoS Response Team; customers must use AWS Shield Advanced to receive this dedicated response support.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一種 Web 應用程式防火牆，可保護 Web 應用程式免受常見攻擊，但它不提供對 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT) 的存取。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. is a web application firewall that protects web applications from common attacks, but it does not provide access to the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT). Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。是一項付費服務，提供高級 DDoS 保護並包含存取 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT)。因此這個選項是。
D.en: Correct. is a paid service that provides advanced DDoS protection and includes access to the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT). Therefore this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：來源未提供投票比例。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項付費服務，提供高級 DDoS 保護並包含存取 AWS DDoS 回應團隊 (DRT)。因此這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: the source did not provide vote percentages. Popular discussion and key point summary: is a paid service that provides advanced DDoS protection and includes access to the AWS DDoS Response Team (DRT). Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或工具提供歷史 AWS 支出模式的視覺化和未來 AWS 成本的預測？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or tool provides a visualization of historical AWS spending patterns and projections of future AWS costs?

A.zh: AWS 成本與使用報告
A.en: AWS Cost and Usage Report

B.zh: AWS 預算
B.en: AWS Budgets

C.zh: 成本管理器
C.en: Cost Explorer

D.zh: 亞馬遜雲端觀看
D.en: Amazon Cloud Watch

A.zh: 錯誤。本服務提供詳細的成本和使用資料報告，適合深入分析，但它不提供視覺化功能或未來成本預測，因此此選項是。
A.en: Incorrect. This service provides detailed cost and usage data reporting, which is suitable for in-depth analysis, but it does not provide visualization capabilities or future cost projections, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。允許使用者設定預算和監控成本，但它主要用於預算管理和警報通知，而不是用於歷史支出視覺化或未來成本預測，因此此選項是。
B.en: Incorrect. allows users to set budgets and monitor costs, but it is primarily used for budget management and alert notifications, not for historical spend visualization or future cost forecasting, so this option is.

C.zh: 正確。是 AWS 提供的工具，用於視覺化歷史支出模式並預測未來成本。完全符合題目要求，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. is a tool provided by AWS for visualizing historical spending patterns and predicting future costs. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon CloudWatch 用於監控資源指標、日誌和警報，不提供 AWS 歷史支出模式和未來成本預測的專用視覺化。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon CloudWatch is used to monitor resource metrics, logs, and alerts and does not provide dedicated visualization of AWS's historical spending patterns and future cost projections.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是 AWS 提供的工具，用於視覺化歷史支出模式並預測未來成本。完全符合題目要求，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a tool provided by AWS for visualizing historical spending patterns and predicting future costs. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在遷移到 AWS 雲，而不是在本地運行其基礎設施。此遷移有下列哪些優點？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company is migrating to the AWS Cloud instead of running its infrastructure on premises. Which of the following are advantages of this migration? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 消除執行安全審核的需要
A.en: Elimination of the need to perform security auditing

B.zh: 提高全球影響力和敏捷性
B.en: Increased global reach and agility

C.zh: 能夠在幾分鐘內進行全球部署
C.en: Ability to deploy globally in minutes

D.zh: 消除 IT 員工成本
D.en: Elimination of the cost of IT staff members

E.zh: 所有計算服務預設冗餘
E.en: Redundancy by default for all compute services

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS提供了許多安全工具和服務，但客戶仍需要對其應用程式和資料進行安全審計。 AWS 的責任共擔模型明確規定，客戶對其資料和應用程式的安全負責。正確答案：BC 正確答案：BC。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS provides many security tools and services, but customers still need to conduct security audits of their applications and data. AWS's shared responsibility model clearly states that customers are responsible for the security of their data and applications. Correct Answer: BC Correct Answer: BC.

B.zh: 正確。AWS 在全球擁有多個區域和可用區，使客戶能夠快速擴展到全球市場，同時利用雲端服務的靈活性來調整資源以滿足需求。
B.en: Correct. AWS has multiple regions and availability zones around the world, allowing customers to quickly expand to global markets while leveraging the flexibility of cloud services to adjust resources to meet demand.

C.zh: 正確。AWS 的全球基礎架構可讓客戶透過 CloudFormation 等自動化工具和服務在幾分鐘內快速將資源部署到多個區域。
C.en: Correct. AWS's global infrastructure allows customers to quickly deploy resources to multiple regions in minutes through automated tools and services such as CloudFormation.

D.zh: 錯誤。雖然遷移到AWS可以降低一些IT營運成本，但仍需要IT人員來管理雲端資源、最佳化架構和確保安全。
D.en: Incorrect. While moving to AWS can reduce some IT operating costs, IT staff is still needed to manage cloud resources, optimize architecture, and ensure security.

E.zh: 錯誤。儘管 AWS 提供高可用性和冗餘選項，但並非所有運算服務預設都是冗餘的。客戶需要根據自己的需求配置冗餘架構。
E.en: Incorrect. Although AWS provides high availability and redundancy options, not all computing services are redundant by default. Customers need to configure a redundant architecture according to their needs.

answer_text.zh: B. 提高全球影響力和敏捷性；C. 能夠在幾分鐘內進行全球部署
answer_text.en: B. Increased global reach and agility; C. Ability to deploy globally in minutes

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BC (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS 在全球擁有多個區域和可用區，使客戶能夠快速擴展到全球市場，同時利用雲端服務的靈活性來調整資源以滿足需求。；AWS 的全球基礎架構可讓客戶透過 CloudFormation 等自動化工具和服務在幾分鐘內快速將資源部署到多個區域。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS has multiple regions and availability zones around the world, allowing customers to quickly expand to global markets while leveraging the flexibility of cloud services to adjust resources to meet demand.; AWS's global infrastructure allows customers to quickly deploy resources to multiple regions in minutes through automated tools and services such as CloudFormation.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務使用邊緣網站來快取內容？
question_text.en: Which AWS service uses edge locations to cache content?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 Kinesis
A.en: Amazon Kinesis

B.zh: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
B.en: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)

C.zh: 亞馬遜 CloudFront
C.en: Amazon CloudFront

D.zh: 亞馬遜 53 號公路
D.en: Amazon Route 53

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Kinesis 是一項用於即時資料流處理、邊緣位置和內容快取無關的服務。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Kinesis is a service for real-time data stream processing, edge location and content caching agnostic.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon SQS 是一種訊息佇列服務，可獨立於邊緣位置和內容快取分離和管理訊息傳遞。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon SQS is a message queuing service that decouples and manages messaging independent of edge locations and content caching.

C.zh: 正確。Amazon CloudFront 是 AWS 提供的內容交付網路 (CDN) 服務，它使用邊緣位置快取內容以加速交付。
C.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service from AWS that uses edge locations to cache content to accelerate delivery.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Route 53 是 AWS 的網域名稱系統 (DNS) 服務，雖然邊緣網站可用於提高 DNS 查詢的效能，但它不用於快取內容。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Route 53 is AWS's Domain Name System (DNS) service, and while edge locations can be used to improve the performance of DNS queries, it is not used to cache content.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon CloudFront 是 AWS 提供的內容交付網路 (CDN) 服務，它使用邊緣位置快取內容以加速交付。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) service from AWS that uses edge locations to cache content to accelerate delivery.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在不存取 Internet 的情況下從 Amazon EC2 執行個體安全地存取 Amazon S3 儲存桶。公司應該用什麼來達成這個目標？
question_text.en: A company wants to securely access an Amazon S3 bucket from an Amazon EC2 instance without accessing the internet. What should the company use to accomplish this goal?

A.zh: VPN 連接
A.en: VPN connection

B.zh: 網際網路網關
B.en: Internet gateway

C.zh: VPC 終端節點
C.en: VPC endpoint

D.zh: NAT 網關
D.en: NAT gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。VPN 連線用於在本機資料和 AWS 之間建立安全通訊通道。它與此問題所要求的存取 AWS 中的 S3 無關。
A.en: Incorrect. The VPN connection is used to establish a secure communication channel between local data and AWS. It has nothing to do with accessing S3 within AWS as required by this question.

B.zh: 錯誤。Internet閘道用來讓VPC內的資源存取Internet，但這題明確要求S3不能透過Internet存取。
B.en: Incorrect. Internet Gateway is used to allow resources in the VPC to access the Internet, but this question clearly requires that S3 not be accessed through the Internet.

C.zh: 正確。VPC Endpoint 允許透過 VPC 內的私有網路直接存取 AWS 服務（例如 S3），無需經過 Internet，完全滿足問題要求。
C.en: Correct. VPC Endpoint allows direct access to AWS services (such as S3) through a private network within a VPC without going through the Internet, which fully meets the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。NAT閘道用於允許私有子網路中的資源存取Internet，但本題要求不透過Internet存取S3。
D.en: Incorrect. NAT Gateway is used to allow resources in a private subnet to access the Internet, but this question requires not accessing S3 through the Internet.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：VPC Endpoint 允許透過 VPC 內的私有網路直接存取 AWS 服務（例如 S3），無需經過 Internet，完全滿足問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: VPC Endpoint allows direct access to AWS services (such as S3) through a private network within a VPC without going through the Internet, which fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要一項可以在 Amazon EC2 執行個體和本機執行個體中自動部署軟體的 AWS 服務。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants an AWS service that can automate software deployment in Amazon EC2 instances and on-premises instances. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS CodeCommit
A.en: AWS CodeCommit

B.zh: AWS CodeBuild
B.en: AWS CodeBuild

C.zh: AWS CodeDeploy
C.en: AWS CodeDeploy

D.zh: AWS CodePipeline
D.en: AWS CodePipeline

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS CodeCommit 是一項用於程式碼儲存和版本控制的託管原始碼控制服務，但它不負責軟體開發。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS CodeCommit is a managed source code control service for code storage and version control, but it is not responsible for software development.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS CodeBuild 是一項建置服務，用於編譯程式碼、執行測試和產生軟體包，但它不負責部署軟體。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS CodeBuild is a build service that compiles code, runs tests, and generates software packages, but it is not responsible for deploying the software.

C.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：AWS CodeDeploy 是一項部署服務，可自動將軟體部署到 Amazon EC2 執行個體、Lambda 函數和本機伺服器，滿足問題要求。
C.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS CodeDeploy is a deployment service that can automate software deployment to Amazon EC2 instances, Lambda functions, and local servers, meeting the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS CodePipeline 是一項用於自動化建置、測試和部署工作流程的持續交付服務，但它本身並不是專門為執行部署而設計的服務。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS CodePipeline is a continuous delivery service for automating build, test, and deployment workflows, but it is not itself a service specifically designed to execute deployment.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：AWS CodeDeploy 是一項部署服務，可自動將軟體部署到 Amazon EC2 執行個體、Lambda 函數和本機伺服器，滿足問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS CodeDeploy is a deployment service that can automate software deployment to Amazon EC2 instances, Lambda functions, and local servers, meeting the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務是無伺服器的？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: Which AWS services are serverless? (Choose two.)

A.zh: AWS Fargate
A.en: AWS Fargate

B.zh: Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka
B.en: Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka

C.zh: 亞馬遜 EMR
C.en: Amazon EMR

D.zh: 亞馬遜 S3
D.en: Amazon S3

A.zh: 正確。雖然 AWS Fargate 可用於運行容器化應用程序，但它並不完全是無伺服器服務，因為它仍然需要使用者定義的容器配置和任務。
A.en: Correct. Although AWS Fargate can be used to run containerized applications, it is not entirely a serverless service because it still requires user-defined container configurations and tasks.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon MSK 是一項託管 Kafka 服務，但它並非完全無伺服器，因為使用者需要管理叢集配置和容量。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon MSK is a managed Kafka service, but it is not completely serverless because users need to manage cluster configuration and capacity.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EMR 是一項託管 Hadoop 桶架服務。使用者需要管理叢集節點，因此不是Serverless服務。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon EMR is a managed Hadoop bucket rack service. Users need to manage cluster nodes, so it is not a Serverless service.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon S3 是一項無伺服器服務。用戶無需管理底層伺服器，支援資料按需儲存和存取。
D.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon S3 is a Serverless service. Users do not need to manage the underlying server and support data storage and access on demand.

E.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EC2 是一種虛擬伺服器服務，使用者需要管理實例，因此它不是無伺服器服務。
E.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon EC2 is a virtual server service and users need to manage instances, so it is not a Serverless service.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS Fargate；D. 亞馬遜 S3
answer_text.en: A. AWS Fargate; D. Amazon S3

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AD (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：雖然 AWS Fargate 可用於運行容器化應用程序，但它並不完全是無伺服器服務，因為它仍然需要使用者定義的容器配置和任務。；Amazon S3 是一項無伺服器服務。用戶無需管理底層伺服器，支援資料按需儲存和存取。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Although AWS Fargate can be used to run containerized applications, it is not entirely a serverless service because it still requires user-defined container configurations and tasks.; This option is described as follows: Amazon S3 is a Serverless service. Users do not need to manage the underlying server and support data storage and access on demand.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 公司希望不斷改進流程和程序以交付業務價值。這個目標代表了 AWS 架構完善的框架的哪一個支柱？
question_text.en: A company wants to continuously improve processes and procedures to deliver business value. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework does this goal represent?

A.zh: 性能效率
A.en: Performance efficiency

B.zh: 卓越運營
B.en: Operational excellence

C.zh: 可靠性
C.en: Reliability

D.zh: 可持續性
D.en: Sustainability

A.zh: 錯誤。效能效率支柱重點在於如何有效地使用運算資源來滿足系統需求。它與持續流程改善和交付業務價值的目標沒有直接關係，所以這個選項是。
A.en: Incorrect. The performance efficiency pillar focuses on how efficiently computing resources are used to meet system demands. It is not directly related to the goals of continuous process improvement and delivery of business value, so this option is.

B.zh: 正確。卓越營運支柱的核心是持續改善流程和程序，以優化營運並交付業務價值。這與問題中描述的目標完全一致，所以這個選項是。
B.en: Correct. At the heart of the operational excellence pillar is the continuous improvement of processes and procedures to optimize operations and deliver business value. This is completely consistent with the goal described in the question, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：可靠性支柱著重於系統從故障狀態中恢復並正常運作的能力。雖然可靠性很重要，但它與持續的流程改善和業務價值的交付沒有直接關係，因此這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. The reliability pillar focuses on the system's ability to recover from fault conditions and operate normally. While reliability is important, it is not directly related to continuous process improvement and delivery of business value, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。永續發展支柱的重點是減少雲端運算對環境的影響。雖然這是一個重要的目標，但它與問題中描述的目標沒有直接關係，所以這個選項是。
D.en: Incorrect. The sustainability pillar focuses on reducing the environmental impact of cloud computing. Although this is an important goal, it is not directly related to the goal described in the question, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：卓越營運支柱的核心是持續改善流程和程序，以優化營運並交付業務價值。這與問題中描述的目標完全一致，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: At the heart of the operational excellence pillar is the continuous improvement of processes and procedures to optimize operations and deliver business value. This is completely consistent with the goal described in the question, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 根據 AWS 責任共擔模型，下列何者是顧客責任？
question_text.en: Which of the following is a customer responsibility according to the AWS shared responsibility model?

A.zh: 為 Amazon S3 基礎設施設備套用安全修補程式。
A.en: Apply security patches for Amazon S3 infrastructure devices.

B.zh: 為 AWS 資料中心提供實體安全。
B.en: Provide physical security for AWS datacenters.

C.zh: 在 Lambda@Edge 上安裝作業系統更新。
C.en: Install operating system updates on Lambda@Edge.

D.zh: 為 IAM 使用者帳戶實施多重身份驗證 (MFA)。
D.en: Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) for IAM user accounts.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 的基礎架構設備由 AWS 負責，客戶無需為 AWS 託管的基礎架構裝置套用安全修補程式。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3's infrastructure devices are the responsibility of AWS, and customers are not required to apply security patches for AWS-managed infrastructure devices.

B.zh: 錯誤。管理安全是 AWS 的責任，客戶無需為 AWS 資料中心提供管理安全。
B.en: Incorrect. Management security is the responsibility of AWS, and customers are not required to provide management security for AWS data centers.

C.zh: 錯誤。Lambda@Edge 是一項完全託管的服務。 AWS負責更新底層作業系統，客戶無需管理作業系統。
C.en: Incorrect. Lambda@Edge is a fully managed service. AWS is responsible for updating the underlying operating system, and customers do not need to manage the operating system.

D.zh: 正確。客戶負責配置和保護其 IAM 身份，包括為 IAM 使用者啟用多重身份驗證以降低憑證外洩的風險。
D.en: Correct. Customers are responsible for configuring and protecting their IAM identities, including enabling multi-factor authentication for IAM users to reduce the risk of credential compromise.

answer_text.zh: D. 為 IAM 使用者帳戶實施多重身份驗證 (MFA)。
answer_text.en: D. Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) for IAM user accounts.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：來源未提供投票比例。熱門討論與考點摘要：客戶負責配置和保護其 IAM 身份，包括為 IAM 使用者啟用多重身份驗證以降低憑證外洩的風險。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: the source did not provide vote percentages. Popular discussion and key point summary: Customers are responsible for configuring and protecting their IAM identities, including enabling multi-factor authentication for IAM users to reduce the risk of credential compromise.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司應使用哪一種 AWS 服務來組織、表徵和搜尋大量影像？
question_text.en: Which AWS service should a company use to organize, characterize, and search large numbers of images?

A.zh: 亞馬遜轉錄
A.en: Amazon Transcribe

B.zh: 亞馬遜 Rekognition
B.en: Amazon Rekognition

C.zh: 亞馬遜極光
C.en: Amazon Aurora

D.zh: 亞馬遜 QuickSight
D.en: Amazon QuickSight

A.zh: 錯誤。是一種將音訊檔案轉換為文字的語音到文字服務。它不適用於圖像組織、分類和搜索，因此此選項適用。
A.en: Incorrect. is a speech-to-text service that converts audio files to text. It does not apply to image organization, classification, and searching, so this option is.

B.zh: 正確。是一種影像和視訊分析服務，可識別物件、場景、人臉，並支援影像的分類和搜尋。這個選項是。
B.en: Correct. is an image and video analysis service that recognizes objects, scenes, faces, and supports classification and search of images. This option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一種關係資料庫服務，主要用於儲存和管理結構化數據，而不是影像處理，因此此選項是。
C.en: Incorrect. is a relational database service designed primarily for storing and managing structured data, not image processing, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一項用於資料視覺化和分析的商業智慧服務，與影像處理無關，所以這個選項是。
D.en: Incorrect. is a business intelligence service for data visualization and analysis and has nothing to do with image processing, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種影像和視訊分析服務，可識別物件、場景、人臉，並支援影像的分類和搜尋。這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is an image and video analysis service that recognizes objects, scenes, faces, and supports classification and search of images. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一項 AWS 服務總是免費提供給使用者？
question_text.en: Which AWS service is always available free of charge to users?

A.zh: 亞馬遜雅典娜
A.en: Amazon Athena

B.zh: AWS 身分和存取管理 (IAM)
B.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

C.zh: AWS Secrets Manager
C.en: AWS Secrets Manager

D.zh: Amazon ElastiCache
D.en: Amazon ElastiCache

A.zh: 錯誤。是一項互動式查詢服務，用於分析 Amazon S3 中儲存的資料。它按查詢收費，因此並不總是免費服務。
A.en: Incorrect. is an interactive query service for analyzing data stored in Amazon S3. It is charged per query, so it is not always a free service.

B.zh: 正確。IAM 是 AWS 的身份和存取管理服務，用於管理使用者、群組和權限。無論帳戶使用情況如何，IAM 始終對用戶免費。
B.en: Correct. IAM is AWS's identity and access management service for managing users, groups, and permissions. IAM is always free to users, regardless of account usage.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一項用於管理和輪調機密的服務。這是一項按使用付費的服務，因此並非總是免費的。
C.en: Incorrect. is a service for managing and rotating secrets. It is a pay-per-use service, so it is not always free.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一種記憶體快取服務，用於加速應用程式效能。這是一項按使用付費的服務，因此並非總是免費的。
D.en: Incorrect. is an in-memory caching service used to accelerate application performance. It is a pay-per-use service, so it is not always free.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS 身分和存取管理 (IAM)
answer_text.en: B. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：IAM 是 AWS 的身份和存取管理服務，用於管理使用者、群組和權限。無論帳戶使用情況如何，IAM 始終對用戶免費。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM is AWS's identity and access management service for managing users, groups, and permissions. IAM is always free to users, regardless of account usage.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在本地運行部分工作負載以遵守監管準則。該公司希望使用 AWS 雲端來運行不需要在本地運行的工作負載。該公司還希望能夠對本地工作負載和雲端工作負載使用相同的 API 呼叫。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務或功能來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to run some of its workloads on premises to comply with regulatory guidelines. The company wants to use the AWS Cloud to run workloads that are not required to be on premises. The company also wants to be able to use the same API calls for the on-premises workloads and the cloud workloads. Which AWS service or feature should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 專用主機
A.en: Dedicated Hosts

B.zh: AWS 前哨站
B.en: AWS Outposts

C.zh: 可用區
C.en: Availability Zones

D.zh: AWS 波長
D.en: AWS Wavelength

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：專用主機是一種用於在AWS雲端提供實體伺服器的服務，主要是為了滿足合規性或授權要求，但它不能用於在本地運行工作負載，因此不滿足問題要求。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Dedicated Hosts is a service used to provide physical servers in the AWS cloud, mainly to meet compliance or licensing requirements, but it cannot be used to run workloads locally and therefore does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 正確。AWS Outposts 是一種混合雲端解決方案，可讓使用者在本機上運行 AWS 服務，同時保持與 AWS 雲端的 API 呼叫一致。這完全符合標題的要求。
B.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts is a hybrid cloud solution that allows users to run AWS services locally while maintaining consistent API calls with the AWS cloud. This fully meets the requirements of the title.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：可用區是AWS雲端中用於高可用性架構設計的資料中心區域，但它們不能用於本地運行工作負載，因此不符合問題要求。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Availability Zones are data center areas in the AWS cloud that are used for high-availability architecture design, but they cannot be used to run workloads locally, so they do not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Wavelength 是一項用於在邊緣網路上執行工作負載的服務。主要用於低延遲的應用場景。但它不支援本地運行工作負載，因此不滿足問題要求。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Wavelength is a service for running workloads on edge networks. It is mainly used in low-latency application scenarios. However, it does not support running workloads locally, so it does not meet the question requirements.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Outposts 是一種混合雲端解決方案，可讓使用者在本機上運行 AWS 服務，同時保持與 AWS 雲端的 API 呼叫一致。這完全符合標題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts is a hybrid cloud solution that allows users to run AWS services locally while maintaining consistent API calls with the AWS cloud. This fully meets the requirements of the title.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: Amazon EC2 按需執行個體的建議使用案例為何？
question_text.en: What is the recommended use case for Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances?

A.zh: 需要長時間使用特定 EC2 執行個體配置的穩態工作負載
A.en: A steady-state workload that requires a particular EC2 instance configuration for a long period of time

B.zh: 對於需要最低成本的項目，可以中斷的工作負載
B.en: A workload that can be interrupted for a project that requires the lowest possible cost

C.zh: 不可預測的工作負載，不需要長期承諾
C.en: An unpredictable workload that does not require a long-term commitment

D.zh: 預計運轉時間超過 1 年的工作負載
D.en: A workload that is expected to run for longer than 1 year

A.zh: 錯誤。對於穩定的長期工作負載，建議使用預留實例，因為它比按需實例具有更低的成本和長期承諾優勢。
A.en: Incorrect. For stable long-term workloads, Reserved Instances are recommended as it offers lower cost and long-term commitment advantages over On-Demand Instances.

B.zh: 錯誤。對於可以中斷的工作負載，建議使用 Spot 實例而不是按需實例，因為它們的成本最低。
B.en: Incorrect. For workloads that can be interrupted, Spot Instances are recommended over On-Demand Instances because they are the lowest cost.

C.zh: 正確。按需實例的主要特點是能夠靈活應對不可預測的工作負載，而無需長期承諾。
C.en: Correct. The main feature of On-Demand Instances is flexibility for unpredictable workloads without the need for long-term commitments.

D.zh: 錯誤。對於預計運行超過 1 年的工作負載，建議使用預留實例，因為它們更經濟。
D.en: Incorrect. For workloads expected to run for more than 1 year, Reserved Instances are recommended as they are more economical.

answer_text.zh: C. 不可預測的工作負載，不需要長期承諾
answer_text.en: C. An unpredictable workload that does not require a long-term commitment

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：按需實例的主要特點是能夠靈活應對不可預測的工作負載，而無需長期承諾。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The main feature of On-Demand Instances is flexibility for unpredictable workloads without the need for long-term commitments.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用 AWS 網路解決方案來充當多個 VPC 和本地網路之間的集中式閘道。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to use an AWS networking solution that can act as a centralized gateway between multiple VPCs and on- premises networks. Which AWS service or feature will meet this requirement?

A.zh: 閘道 VPC 終端節點
A.en: Gateway VPC endpoint

B.zh: AWS Direct Connect
B.en: AWS Direct Connect

C.zh: AWS Transit Gateway
C.en: AWS Transit Gateway

D.zh: AWS PrivateLink
D.en: AWS PrivateLink

A.zh: 錯誤。用於 VPC 內到 AWS 服務（例如 S3 和 DynamoDB）的私人連線。它無法充當多個 VPC 和本地網路之間的集中式網關，因此此選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is used for private connections within a VPC to AWS services such as S3 and DynamoDB. It cannot act as a centralized gateway between multiple VPCs and on-premises networks, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一種專用網路連線服務，用於將本機資料中心與 AWS 連線。雖然它可以連接到本地網絡，但它不能充當多個 VPC 之間的集中式網關，因此此選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is a private network connection service used to connect on-premises data centers with AWS. While it can connect to local networks, it cannot act as a centralized gateway between multiple VPCs, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。是一種集中式閘道服務，可連接多個 VPC 和本機網路。它支援跨區域、跨帳戶的網路連接，是滿足問題需求的正確選擇。
C.en: Correct. is a centralized gateway service that can connect multiple VPCs and on-premises networks. It supports cross-region and cross-account network connections and is the right option to meet the needs of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。用於在 VPC 之間或 VPC 與本地網路之間建立私有連接，但其主要用途是存取特定服務，而不是充當集中式網關。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. is used to establish private connections between VPCs or between a VPC and an on-premises network, but its primary use is to access specific services rather than acting as a centralized gateway. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種集中式閘道服務，可連接多個 VPC 和本機網路。它支援跨區域、跨帳戶的網路連接，是滿足問題需求的正確選擇。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a centralized gateway service that can connect multiple VPCs and on-premises networks. It supports cross-region and cross-account network connections and is the right option to meet the needs of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 管理員發現昨天刪除了多個 AWS 資源。哪種 AWS 服務可以協助確定原因並確定哪個使用者刪除了資源？
question_text.en: An administrator observed that multiple AWS resources were deleted yesterday. Which AWS service will help identify the cause and determine which user deleted the resources?

A.zh: AWS CloudTrail
A.en: AWS CloudTrail

B.zh: 亞馬遜檢查員
B.en: Amazon Inspector

C.zh: 亞馬遜 GuardDuty
C.en: Amazon GuardDuty

D.zh: AWS 可信任顧問
D.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

A.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：AWS CloudTrail 是一項記錄使用者和服務的 API 呼叫歷史記錄的服務。它可以幫助管理員查看誰建立、修改或刪除了資源。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS CloudTrail is a service that records the history of API calls by users and services. It helps administrators see who has created, modified, or deleted resources.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Inspector 是一項自動化安全評估服務，用於檢查應用程式是否有安全漏洞和合規性問題，而不是追蹤資源刪除。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Inspector is an automated security assessment service that examines applications for security vulnerabilities and compliance issues rather than tracking resource deletions.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon GuardDuty 是一項威脅偵測服務，可識別潛在的惡意活動或未經授權的行為，但它不會記錄資源刪除。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service that identifies potentially malicious activity or unauthorized behavior, but it does not log resource deletions.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Trusted Advisor 是一項最佳化建議服務，提供成本優化、安全性、效能和容錯建議，但它不會記錄使用者活動或資源刪除操作。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Trusted Advisor is an optimization recommendation service that provides cost optimization, security, performance, and fault tolerance recommendations, but it does not log user activity or resource deletion operations.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：AWS CloudTrail 是一項記錄使用者和服務的 API 呼叫歷史記錄的服務。它可以幫助管理員查看誰建立、修改或刪除了資源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS CloudTrail is a service that records the history of API calls by users and services. It helps administrators see who has created, modified, or deleted resources.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 為了幫助公司在雲端實現支付卡產業資料安全標準 (PCI DSS) 合規性，AWS 提供：
question_text.en: To assist companies with Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) compliance in the cloud, AWS provides:

A.zh: 預約對資料中心進行實體檢查。
A.en: physical Inspections of data centers by appointment.

B.zh: 在 AWS 上執行的任何應用程式都需要 PCI 合規性認證。
B.en: required PCI compliance certifications for any application running on AWS.

C.zh: 針對特定 AWS 服務的 AWS 合規性證明 (AOC) 報告。
C.en: an AWS Attestation of Compliance (AOC) report for specific AWS services.

D.zh: 專業的 PCI 合規服務。
D.en: professional PCI compliance services.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS 不允許客戶對資料中心進行實體檢查。 AWS資料中心的安全性由AWS管理，其合規性透過第三方審計進行驗證。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS does not allow customers to conduct physical inspections of data centers. AWS data center security is managed by AWS and its compliance is verified through third-party audits.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS 提供基礎架構的合規性認證，但應用程式的 PCI DSS 合規性是客戶的責任。 AWS 不直接為客戶應用程式提供 PCI 認證。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS provides compliance certification of the infrastructure, but PCI DSS compliance of the application is the customer's responsibility. AWS does not directly provide PCI certification for customer applications.

C.zh: 正確。答案：C 正確答案：C AWS 提供 AOC 報告來證明其特定服務符合 PCI DSS 要求。這些報告可以幫助客戶評估AWS服務的合規性。
C.en: Correct. Answer: C Correct Answer: C AWS provides AOC reports to prove that its specific services comply with PCI DSS requirements. These reports can help customers assess the compliance of AWS services.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS 並未直接提供專業的 PCI 合規性服務。客戶可以使用 AWS 的合規性工具和文件來協助實現 PCI DSS 合規性，但特定的合規性服務通常由第三方提供。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS does not directly provide professional PCI compliance services. Customers can use AWS's compliance tools and documentation to help achieve PCI DSS compliance, but specific compliance services are typically provided by third parties.

answer_text.zh: C. 針對特定 AWS 服務的 AWS 合規性證明 (AOC) 報告。
answer_text.en: C. an AWS Attestation of Compliance (AOC) report for specific AWS services.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：答案：C 正確答案：C AWS 提供 AOC 報告來證明其特定服務符合 PCI DSS 要求。這些報告可以幫助客戶評估AWS服務的合規性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Answer: C Correct Answer: C AWS provides AOC reports to prove that its specific services comply with PCI DSS requirements. These reports can help customers assess the compliance of AWS services.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 公司在哪些情況下應創建 IAM 使用者而不是 IAM 角色？
question_text.en: In which situations should a company create an IAM user instead of an IAM role?

A.zh: 當在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的應用程式需要存取其他 AWS 服務時
A.en: When an application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances requires access to other AWS services

B.zh: 當公司為個人建立 AWS 存取憑證時
B.en: When the company creates AWS access credentials for individuals

C.zh: 當公司建立在手機上運行並向 AWS 發出請求的應用程式時
C.en: When the company creates an application that runs on a mobile phone that makes requests to AWS

D.zh: 當公司需要將使用者加入IAM群組時
D.en: When the company needs to add users to IAM groups

E.zh: 當使用者在公司網路中經過驗證並且希望無需再次登入即可使用 AWS 時
E.en: When users are authenticated in the corporate network and want to be able to use AWS without having to sign in a second time

A.zh: 錯誤。對於在 EC2 執行個體上運行的應用程序，最佳實踐是使用 IAM 角色而不是 IAM 使用者。 IAM 角色可以附加到 EC2 實例，從而允許應用程式 D (50%) 安全地存取其他 AWS 服務，而無需管理長期憑證。
A.en: Incorrect. For applications running on EC2 instances, the best practice is to use IAM roles instead of IAM users. IAM roles can be attached to EC2 instances, allowing Application D (50%) to securely access other AWS services without having to manage long-term credentials.

B.zh: 正確。IAM 使用者是為個人建立存取憑證的正確選擇。每個IAM用戶都有唯一的存取金鑰和密碼，可以直接登入AWS管理控制臺或透過API存取AWS服務。
B.en: Correct. IAM users are the correct choice for creating access credentials for individuals. Each IAM user has a unique access key and password and can log in directly to the AWS management console or access AWS services through APIs.

C.zh: 錯誤。對於行動應用程序，Amazon Cognito 或 IAM 角色通常用於管理訪問，而不是 IAM 使用者。 IAM使用者不適合直接應用存取授權。
C.en: Incorrect. For mobile applications, Amazon Cognito or IAM roles are typically used to manage access, not IAM users. IAM users are not suitable for direct application access authorization.

D.zh: 錯誤。IAM 群組是用來管理多個 IAM 使用者的權限集合。儘管可以將 IAM 使用者新增至 IAM 群組，但這並不是創建 IAM 使用者的主要原因。
D.en: Incorrect. An IAM group is a collection of permissions used to manage multiple IAM users. Although IAM users can be added to IAM groups, this is not the main reason for creating IAM users.

E.zh: 錯誤。第二次 此場景通常使用 AWS 單一登入 (SSO) 或聯合身份驗證，而不是建立 IAM 使用者。
E.en: Incorrect. second time This scenario typically uses AWS Single Sign-On (SSO) or federated authentication instead of creating an IAM user.

answer_text.zh: B. 當公司為個人建立 AWS 存取憑證時
answer_text.en: B. When the company creates AWS access credentials for individuals

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (67%)； D (33%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：IAM 使用者是為個人建立存取憑證的正確選擇。每個IAM用戶都有唯一的存取金鑰和密碼，可以直接登入AWS管理控制臺或透過API存取AWS服務。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (67%); D (33%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM users are the correct choice for creating access credentials for individuals. Each IAM user has a unique access key and password and can log in directly to the AWS management console or access AWS services through APIs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上託管一個 Web 應用程式。該公司透過配置多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體提高了其應用程式的可用性。該公司希望在 EC2 執行個體之間分配流量，同時為 Web 用戶端提供單點聯繫。哪一種 AWS 服務可以將流量指派到作為目標的多個 EC2 執行個體？
question_text.en: A company hosts a web application on AWS. The company has improved the availability of its application by provisioning multiple Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants to distribute its traffic across the EC2 instances while providing a single point of contact to the web clients. Which AWS service can distribute the traffic to multiple EC2 instances as targets?

A.zh: VPC 終端節點
A.en: VPC endpoints

B.zh: 應用程式負載平衡器
B.en: Application Load Balancer

C.zh: NAT 網關
C.en: NAT gateway

D.zh: 網際網路網關
D.en: Internet gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：VPC 終端節點用於與 VPC 內的 AWS 服務的私有連接，而不是用於將流量指派到多個 EC2 執行個體。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: VPC endpoints are used for private connections to AWS services within a VPC, not for distributing traffic to multiple EC2 instances.

B.zh: 正確。Application Load Balancer 是 AWS 提供的負載平衡服務，可將流量指派到多個 EC2 實例，並向用戶端提供單一存取點。
B.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Application Load Balancer is a load balancing service provided by AWS that can distribute traffic to multiple EC2 instances and provide a single access point to the client.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：NAT 網關用於允許私有子網路中的執行個體存取網際網路，而不是將流量分發到多個 EC2 執行個體。
C.en: Incorrect. A NAT gateway is used to allow instances in a private subnet to access the internet, rather than to distribute traffic to multiple EC2 instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。公網閘道用於VPC內的資源與公網通信，但不具備流量分送功能。
D.en: Incorrect. The Internet gateway is used to allow resources in the VPC to communicate with the Internet, but it does not have the traffic distribution function.

answer_text.zh: B. 應用程式負載平衡器

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Application Load Balancer 是 AWS 提供的負載平衡服務，可將流量指派到多個 EC2 實例，並向用戶端提供單一存取點。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Application Load Balancer is a load balancing service provided by AWS that can distribute traffic to multiple EC2 instances and provide a single access point to the client.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: Amazon S3 中可以儲存的總資料量是多少？
question_text.en: What is the total volume of data that can be stored in Amazon S3?

A.zh: 10 PB
A.en: 10 PB

B.zh: 50 PB
B.en: 50 PB

C.zh: 100 PB
C.en: 100 PB

D.zh: 幾乎無限
D.en: Virtually unlimited

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3的儲存容量並沒有特別限制為10PB，使用者可以儲存遠超過cup容量的資料。
A.en: Incorrect. The storage capacity of Amazon S3 is not specifically limited to 10 PB, and users can store data far exceeding the cup capacity.

B.zh: 錯誤。同樣，Amazon S3的儲存容量也不限於50PB，使用者可以儲存更多資料。
B.en: Incorrect. Likewise, the storage capacity of Amazon S3 is not limited to 50 PB, and users can store more data.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3的儲存容量不限於100PB，使用者可以儲存幾乎無限的資料。
C.en: Incorrect. The storage capacity of Amazon S3 is not limited to 100 PB, and users can store almost unlimited data.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon S3的儲存容量「幾乎無限」，用戶可以根據需要儲存盡可能多的資料。
D.en: Correct. The storage capacity of Amazon S3 is "almost unlimited" and users can store as much data as they need.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon S3的儲存容量「幾乎無限」，用戶可以根據需要儲存盡可能多的資料。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The storage capacity of Amazon S3 is "almost unlimited" and users can store as much data as they need.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 根據 AWS 架構完善的框架，哪一個設計原則與可靠度支柱相關？
question_text.en: Which design principle is related to the reliability pillar according to the AWS Well-Architected Framework?

A.zh: 測試復原程序
A.en: Test recovery procedures

B.zh: 更頻繁地進行實驗
B.en: Experiment more often

C.zh: 幾分鐘內走向全球
C.en: Go global in minutes

D.zh: 分析並歸因於支出
D.en: Analyze and attribute to expenditure

A.zh: 正確。可靠性支柱強調系統在故障情況下的恢復能力，測試恢復過程是確保系統在故障後能夠快速恢復的重要設計原則。
A.en: Correct. The reliability pillar emphasizes the system's ability to recover under fault conditions, and testing recovery procedures is an important design principle to ensure that the system can recover quickly after a fault.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項與創新支柱相關，而不是可靠性支柱。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is related to the Innovation pillar, not the Reliability pillar.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項與效能效率支柱相關，而不是可靠度支柱。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is related to the Performance Efficiency pillar, not the Reliability pillar.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項與成本優化支柱相關，而不是可靠性支柱。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is related to the Cost Optimization pillar, not the Reliability pillar.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：可靠性支柱強調系統在故障情況下的恢復能力，測試恢復過程是確保系統在故障後能夠快速恢復的重要設計原則。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The reliability pillar emphasizes the system's ability to recover under fault conditions, and testing recovery procedures is an important design principle to ensure that the system can recover quickly after a fault.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。 AWS 負責哪一項任務？
question_text.en: A company stores data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Which task is the responsibility of AWS?

A.zh: 設定 S3 生命週期策略。
A.en: Configure an S3 Lifecycle policy.

B.zh: 啟動 S3 版本控制。
B.en: Activate S3 Versioning.

C.zh: 設定 S3 儲存桶策略。
C.en: Configure S3 bucket policies.

D.zh: 保護支援 S3 儲存的基礎架構。
D.en: Protect the infrastructure that supports S3 storage.

A.zh: 錯誤。設定 S3 生命週期策略是客戶的責任，因為它會影響資料生命週期的管理和回傳方式。
A.en: Incorrect. Configuring the S3 Lifecycle strategy is the customer's responsibility as it affects how the lifecycle of the data is managed and returned.

B.zh: 錯誤。啟用 S3 版本控制是客戶的責任，因為它是一項可選功能，客戶需要根據自己的需求進行配置。
B.en: Incorrect. Enabling S3 Versioning is the customer's responsibility as it is an optional feature and customers need to configure it according to their needs.

C.zh: 錯誤。答案：D 正確答案：D 設定 S3 儲存桶策略是客戶的責任，因為它涉及存取控制和權限管理。
C.en: Incorrect. Answer: D Correct Answer: D Configuring the S3 bucket policy is the customer's responsibility as it involves access control and permission management.

D.zh: 正確。保護支援 S3 儲存的基礎設施是 AWS 的責任，因為它是軟體和底層基礎設施安全管理的一部分，是 AWS 責任共擔模型的一部分。
D.en: Correct. Securing the infrastructure supporting S3 storage is AWS's responsibility, as it is part of the security management of the software and underlying infrastructure as part of the AWS Shared Responsibility Model.

answer_text.zh: D. 保護支援 S3 儲存的基礎架構。
answer_text.en: D. Protect the infrastructure that supports S3 storage.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：來源未提供投票比例。熱門討論與考點摘要：保護支援 S3 儲存的基礎設施是 AWS 的責任，因為它是軟體和底層基礎設施安全管理的一部分，是 AWS 責任共擔模型的一部分。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: the source did not provide vote percentages. Popular discussion and key point summary: Securing the infrastructure supporting S3 storage is AWS's responsibility, as it is part of the security management of the software and underlying infrastructure as part of the AWS Shared Responsibility Model.
